creator: Doug@gorean.org
text:
Small typo in a fortune

Fix: Apply the following patch in /usr/src/games/fortune/datfiles



Also, this fortune is in the fortunes2 file, but on the -current system
the typo is not present. I'm not sure this fortune needs to be there twice, 
so a better solution might be to delete it from the fortunes file (leaving it 
in fortunes2). While I'm at it, why are so many fortunes duplicated anyway?

Bored on a friday,

Doug--iWisJ6mcFmhjfZB12cwPQVf7BqG0Tsp9X5x3V5fpmUeJJNoO
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- fortunes.Dist       Sun Nov  8 21:40:22 1998
+++ fortunes    Fri Jul 23 15:55:11 1999
@@ -8011,7 +8011,7 @@
        (2) Never precede any maneuver by a comment more predictive
            than "Watch this!"
 %
-Keep you Eye on the Ball,
+Keep your Eye on the Ball,
 Your Shoulder to the Wheel,
 Your Nose to the Grindstone,
 Your Feet on the Ground,
How-To-Repeat: 
	DNA
